title: FullCalendar React Setup
description: Basic FullCalendar setup in React with dayGridPlugin and interactionPlugin.

title: Multi-Plugin Initialization
description: Initialize with dayGrid, timeGrid, and list plugins with header toolbar configuration.

title: External Drag and Drop
description: Making external events draggable onto the calendar with the Draggable API.

title: Event Dragging and Resizing
description: Enabling event manipulation with the interaction plugin.
content:
# Event Dragging and Resizing

Requires interactionPlugin and editable: true.

```javascript
import { Calendar } from '@fullcalendar/core';
import interactionPlugin from '@fullcalendar/interaction';

let calendar = new Calendar(calendarEl, {
  plugins: [interactionPlugin],
  editable: true
});
```

Callbacks:
- eventDragStart(info) - when dragging begins
- eventDrop(info) - when event is dropped in a new position
- eventResizeStart(info) - when resizing begins
- eventResize(info) - when resizing completes
- eventClick(info) - when event is clicked
- dateClick(info) - when a date/time is clicked
- select(info) - when a date range is selected

info objects contain: event, el, delta, revert(), jsEvent, view.

**Category:** Features
**URL:** https://fullcalendar.io/docs/event-dragging-resizing

title: Event Object and Sources
description: Event object structure and event source configuration.

title: Resource Timeline Views
description: Timeline views with resources (rooms, people, equipment) displayed as rows.

title: Resource Grouping with Custom Columns
description: Group resources by field (e.g., building) with custom resource columns.
content:
# Resource Grouping

```javascript
resourceAreaWidth: '40%',
resourceColumns: [
  {group: true, labelText: 'Building', field: 'building'},
  {labelText: 'Room', field: 'title'},
  {labelText: 'Occupancy', field: 'occupancy'}
],
resources: [
  {id:'a', building:'460 Bryant', title:'Auditorium A', occupancy:40},
  {id:'b', building:'460 Bryant', title:'Auditorium B', occupancy:40},
  {id:'c', building:'564 Pacific', title:'Conference C', occupancy:20},
]
```
group:true groups resources by that field with collapsible headers.

title: Date Selection for Event Creation
description: Using selectable and select callback for interactive event creation by clicking/dragging.

title: Event Data Transform
description: Transform external event data into FullCalendar format using eventDataTransform callback.

title: Event Sources - JSON Feed, Function, Google Calendar
description: Multiple ways to supply events: URL feed, function, array, or Google Calendar.

title: Vertical Resource View
description: Resources as columns in day/week views with custom view definitions.
